TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjuabal ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 302 buwan, 879 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 861 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjuabal hya' ga Tjuavanaq. tay mkyahu' na Tjuabal hya' ga Dralendren. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuabal ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjuaβal ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjuaβal ħjaʔ ɣa tjua*anaq. taj mkjaħuʔ na tjuaβal ħjaʔ ɣa *ralen*ren. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjuaβal ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tjuabal ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 302 buwan, 879 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 861 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjuabal hya' ga Tjuavanaq. tay mkyahu' na Tjuabal hya' ga Dralendren. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuabal ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjuaβal ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjuaβal ħjaʔ ɣa tjua*anaq. taj mkjaħuʔ na tjuaβal ħjaʔ ɣa *ralen*ren. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjuaβal ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
